THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUTTON, OLIVER WALKER, SYLVIA CLARK, COREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 100 GONZALEZ $3,647.76 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,647.76, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WILL NOT EVEICT DURING TERMS OF STIPULATION SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
